items.summary: Replace the existing BottomNav fixed bottom navigation bar with a fixed left sidebar navigation. The sidebar should display each nav item as an icon with a tooltip showing the item's name on hover. The sidebar should be narrow (icon-only) by default. Maintain the same five navigation tabs: Home, JapCount (with mala image), BhajanMarg, Dashboard, and Settings. Highlight the active page consistently with the existing spiritual theme.

Display the currently selected god's image in the left sidebar using object-contain styling so the full image is visible without cropping. Place it above or below the navigation icons in a dedicated image slot within the sidebar.
